spec_match.rationale: The focusgroup side now uses focusgroup="radiogroup block nomemory" and gives custom div radio items tabindex="0" so they are valid focus candidates.

interactive.rationale: Both panels contain active click handlers and the old panel has manual key handling, but chrome-devtools-mcp was unavailable for keyboard walkthrough.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The explanatory text now distinguishes focus management from widget selection state and no longer claims obsolete axis values.

edge_cases.rationale: The page now covers custom non-native focusable items, but memory and wrap behavior still need live browser evidence.

references.rationale: The page cites the ChromeStatus feature and current scoped Open UI explainer.

design_system.rationale: Existing borders, focus outlines, variable colors, and comparison layout remain intact.

openQuestions.title: Verify custom radio candidates
openQuestions.detail: Use chrome-devtools-mcp to confirm the right-panel div radios are one tab stop, arrow through with Up/Down, preserve focusgroupstart behavior, and do not emit console errors.

summary: Static repair fixed the current radiogroup syntax and the missing tabindex on custom radio items; live DevTools-MCP keyboard verification remains open.
